findings.message: New runtime service `widgetizer` is defined only in `dev.yml` (profiles: ["dev"]). Per Taskfile.yml and infra/deploy/strategy.sh, dev.yml is a DEV/TEST-ONLY overlay — staging/prod compose `<env>.yml + services.yml + observability.yml` and do NOT include dev.yml. So this service reaches dev but is silently absent from staging and prod. It is a real backing service (an image-based processor consuming the app Postgres via WIDGETIZER_DB_URL), not local-developer-experience tooling (not TLS termination, mail catcher, or DB admin UI), so it cannot be excused as dev-only.
findings.suggestion: Define `widgetizer` in `infra/compose/services.yml` (the battery-service overlay staging/prod compose) or in the deployed `staging.yml`/`prod.yml` overlays so it reaches all environments. If it is genuinely intended to be dev-only, record that opt-out in the decisions log rather than leaving it silently omitted from prod.
